weather.synopsis: Issued 10:30 AM PDT 11 April 2026 Today Tonight and Sunday At 10:30 a.m. PDT today quasi-stationary ridge from high located on a line northeast-southwest over the Alaska panhandle. At 10:30 a.m. PDT today trough located over the Central Coast to the Washington Coast. By midnight PDT tonight trough located from the Central Coast to BC interior.
